question: What is the relationship between the spider web and the pine tree? Select from the following options: (A) The spider web is on the ground next to the pine tree.. (B) The spider web is on a different tree behind the pine tree.. (C) The spider web is covering the pine tree.. (D) The spider web is hanging from a branch of the pine tree..
gold_answer: The spider web is hanging from a branch of the pine tree
answer_choices: The spider web is on the ground next to the pine tree
The spider web is on a different tree behind the pine tree
The spider web is covering the pine tree
The spider web is hanging from a branch of the pine tree
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
inpaint_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, artifacts, distortion, blur
